financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is making a lot of money and managing it wisely, which is a good sign.
Even with tough economic times, the company is doing better than most in its field.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Low Risk
bullets: The company faces risks from cyber threats and global events, but is taking steps to protect itself.
Finding and keeping skilled workers is tough, but the company is working on training and development.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing a great job taking care of the environment and managing its leadership.
They are also performing well in how they treat people and communities, but there's room for improvement.

capital_structure.title: Capital Structure
capital_structure.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is in a strong financial position because it doesn't rely much on borrowing money.
They have plenty of cash and focus on rewarding shareholders, which makes them financially stable.

management_discussion.title: Management Discussion
management_discussion.label: Excellent
bullets: The company clearly explains how it's doing now and what it plans to do in the future.
They have strong relationships with clients and a good number of future projects lined up.

strategy.title: Strategy Overview
strategy.label: Excellent
bullets: The company has a clear plan with specific goals and a strong history of achieving them.
They focus on being adaptable and innovative, which helps them handle challenges and grow over time.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: TCS is doing well because it focuses on new technology and keeps its customers happy, which helps it grow.
Even though there are challenges, TCS's strong financial health and smart investments make it a good choice for future growth.
